subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Kunemba ka jishimikila ne kupana lufunjisho lujimo kwesakana na bwikalo bwabo.
topics: Ituvululako kwiyuka atweba beene na beene ne ko twafuma.
